[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.6.5" _module_preset="default" background_enable_color="off" background_enable_image="off" locked="off"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.6.5" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.6.5" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.6.5" _module_preset="default" header_2_font="Amaranth||||||||" header_2_text_align="center" header_2_text_color="#000000" header_2_font_size="55px" header_2_line_height="1.2em" header_2_font_size_tablet="36px" header_2_font_size_phone="30px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|tablet"]

Try Frequently Asked Questions in Grid Style

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.6.5" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.6.5" _module_preset="default"][dipl_faq_page_schema schema_layout="dipl_faq_grid" number_of_column="2" use_masonry="on" closed_toggle_bg_color="#edf3f6" open_toggle_bg_color="#6bbdcc" global_question_custom_padding="|||25px|false|false" global_answer_custom_padding="|20px||50px|false|false" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default" faq_heading_font="Roboto Mono|700|||||||" faq_heading_font_size="30px" faq_question_closed_font="Roboto||||||||" faq_question_closed_text_color="#000000" faq_question_closed_font_size="25px" faq_question_open_font="Roboto||||||||" faq_question_open_text_color="#ffffff" faq_question_open_font_size="25px" faq_answer_text_font="Roboto||||||||" faq_answer_text_text_color="#ffffff" faq_answer_text_font_size="19px" faq_answer_text_line_height="1.6em" faq_question_closed_font_size_tablet="18px" faq_question_closed_font_size_phone="" faq_question_closed_font_size_last_edited="on|tablet" faq_answer_text_font_size_tablet="15px" faq_answer_text_font_size_phone="" faq_answer_text_font_size_last_edited="on|tablet" border_radii="on|20px|20px|20px|20px" border_width_all="0px"][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="Does Divi Plus FAQPage Schema module create marked up FAQs?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default" box_shadow_style="preset1" box_shadow_blur="4px"]Yes, with the Divi Plus FAQPage Schema module, you can create a properly marked up FAQ page that would appear in the search result as a rich snippet. Moreover, you'll get multiple options to make the FAQ page look engaging and beautiful.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="What are the features of the FAQPage Schema module?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default" box_shadow_style="preset1" box_shadow_blur="4px"]

There are multiple features in the FAQPage Schema module, some of are as follows,

  • Accordion & Grid FAQPage Schema Layout.
  • Display FAQs in up to 4 columns.
  • Showcase FAQs in the masonry style.
  • And many more.
[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="Do I need to be an advanced Divi user to use the FAQPage Schema module?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default" box_shadow_style="preset1" box_shadow_blur="4px"]

No, there’s no such requirement from a user to use the Divi Plus FAQPage Schema module. You can use it with fewer or no knowledge of the Divi Builder. For more information, you can check out its documentation page.

Learn how to use the module here → FAQPage Schema Module Documentation.

[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="How much time it would take an FAQPage to appear in the Search?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default" box_shadow_style="preset1" box_shadow_blur="4px"]

It totally depends on the search engine and how frequently they crawl your website. But if you want to list your FAQPage in the minimum time possible, then you can manually add your page to the search engines’ database using their webmaster tools. It will add your FAQPage in a couple of minutes and you'd be able to see the FAQPage Schema applied to it.

[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][/dipl_faq_page_schema][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
